cotton.notes: Cotton requires balanced NPK with split nitrogen applications. Adjust based on soil type and region (Maharashtra).

sugarcane.notes: Sugarcane is a heavy feeder requiring high NPK. Multiple topdressings recommended, especially in rainfed conditions.

wheat.notes: Wheat prefers smaller basal and larger split topdressings. Tune split by variety/region.

maize.notes: Maize benefits from relatively larger basal N.

rice.notes: Wetland rice often needs special timing; consult local practice.

soybean.notes: Soybean often fixes N biologically — low synthetic N recommended.
